command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.191 "sudo tee /etc/gitea/app.ini > /dev/null << 'INIEOF'
APP_NAME = Gitea
RUN_USER = git
RUN_MODE = prod
WORK_PATH = /var/lib/gitea

[database]
DB_TYPE  = sqlite3
PATH     = /var/lib/gitea/data/gitea.db

[repository]
ROOT = /var/lib/gitea/data/repositories

[server]
DOMAIN           = 192.168.0.191
HTTP_PORT        = 3000
ROOT_URL         = http://192.168.0.191:3000/
DISABLE_SSH      = false
SSH_PORT         = 22
LFS_START_SERVER = false

[security]
INSTALL_LOCK = true
SECRET_KEY   = changeThisToARandomString1234567890abcdef

[log]
ROOT_PATH = /var/lib/gitea/log
MODE      = file
LEVEL     = info
INIEOF
sudo chown root:git /etc/gitea/app.ini && sudo chmod 660 /etc/gitea/app.ini && echo done"
